title: Spring Boot REST API
description: Production-ready CRUD REST API built with Spring Boot. Features JWT-based authentication, role management, and optimized MySQL queries with joins and indexing. Deployed on Render.

title: Real-Time Chat Application
description: Real-time messaging system with bi-directional communication using Socket.io. Implemented user sessions, message broadcasting, and optimized server handling for multiple concurrent users.

title: Task Management System
description: Real-time task tracking app with Firebase backend. Implemented authentication, cloud data storage, and live updates with a clean Angular interface focused on performance and usability.

title: Social Media Web App
description: Full-stack social media platform with user authentication and CRUD operations. Designed REST APIs for handling user data and posts with a responsive React UI and Node.js backend.
